results.title: Angadipuram Tali Sree Mahadeva Temple: An Ancient Shiva Shrine of Valluvanad
results.description: The word Tali in Kerala’s historical setting commonly refers to an important Shiva temple associated with an established settlement or regional centre. Such temples often became focal points for worship, community gatherings, learning, land administration and cultural activity. The presence of a Tali temple therefore indicates the former importance of Angadipuram as a well-organised religious and social centre. The post Angadipuram Tali Sree Mahadeva Temple: An Ancient Shiva Shrine of Valluvanad appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged | Defence, Diplomacy, Economy, Health, Ayurveda, Heritage .
